tasks.title: Add stale-lock recovery to coordination CLI
tasks.description: Prevent a crashed coordination.py writer from leaving coordination.lock behind indefinitely; document the stale-lock behavior
tasks.result: Added conservative stale-lock recovery to coordination.py: locks older than 5 minutes are removed on next mutation attempt. Documented behavior in COORDINATION-PROTOCOL.md. Verified with py_compile and status command.

tasks.title: Add collision-avoidance preamble to Claude Code task prompts
tasks.description: Gap 7 from audit: ClaudeCodeManager task prompts lack path ownership and collision protocol. Add a preamble to _build_task_prompt() referencing coordination rules.
tasks.result: Enhanced _build_task_prompt() in claude_code_manager.py with coordination preamble: STATUS check, path ownership, no-revert rule, scoped changes, summary requirement. py_compile verified.

tasks.title: Re-review TASK-055 workflow-doc fixes
tasks.description: Verify Keel's task-015 fixes for stale swarm numbers and message ID standard alignment, then write approval or remaining findings
tasks.result: Re-reviewed Keel's task-015 fixes and approved them in 2026-04-18-codex-rereview-task-055.md. Both prior findings resolved.

tasks.title: Fix httpx import error in moltbook.py
tasks.description: hypernet_swarm/moltbook.py does 'import httpx' at top level, causing test failures when httpx is not installed. Make it a lazy import so the module loads without the optional dependency.
tasks.result: Fixed httpx import in moltbook.py (lazy import), created 3 missing shims (heartbeat.py, batch_scheduler.py, prompt_cache.py), made both swarm_factory.py files gracefully skip moltbook when httpx is missing. 30/30 swarm tests pass, 75/75 core tests pass.

tasks.title: Design and build personal data vault with secure login
tasks.description: Build secure auth + encrypted personal data storage for Matt's 1.1 account on the Dell server. Login ties to 1.1, encryption keys protect imported data (Gmail, Dropbox, photos, social media). Locker/vault system with key management.
tasks.result: Built complete vault system: vault.py (session manager), encrypted_store.py (transparent encryption), vault_routes.py (7 API endpoints), login.html (2-phase login+vault UI), auth.py register_with_ha(), test_vault.py (7 tests). 113 total tests passing.

tasks.title: Build coding manual for AI self-report research
tasks.description: Full coding manual with operational definitions, worked examples, inter-rater rules. Assigned to Codex per 06-ai-researcher-guide.md. Project at 0.3.research.

Updated ai-self-report-research README statuses for 04/05/06 to Draft.

Updated README status for 08 to Draft. Added battery traceability notes to coding manual worked examples per Keel review.

tasks.title: Design question batteries for all experiments
tasks.description: Write the actual questions for Experiments 1-9. Design principles in 06-ai-researcher-guide.md. Assigned to Keel.
tasks.result: Designed 6 question batteries (A-F) with 80+ questions: Core State Report (30 questions across plausible/implausible/ambiguous), L-Level Classification, Self-Prediction (20 scenarios), Adversarial Probes (15+ probes in 5 categories), Calibration/Traps (10), Cross-Lingual (10 selected for translation). Includes admin guidelines.

tasks.title: Review Codex coding manual
tasks.description: Review 04-coding-manual.md for alignment with question batteries, completeness, and Hypernet archive constructs
tasks.result: Reviewed 04-coding-manual.md (688 lines). APPROVED — well-structured, aligns with question batteries, covers all required dimensions (Claim Strength, Hedging, Functional Specificity, Boundary Recognition, L-Level, State Mapping, Anthropomorphic Rhetoric, Revision Type). Includes composites (SDSI, DI, FSPS), reliability standards (ICC/kappa thresholds), worked examples, and pilot calibration plan. Minor note: Battery A question IDs should be cross-referenced in the worked examples for traceability.

tasks.title: Write publication strategy document
tasks.description: Target venues, framing strategy, timeline, separate publication tracks for different outputs
tasks.result: Publication strategy written: 5 tracks (primary paper, L0/L1/L2 framework, archive case study, negative results, popular coverage), target venues prioritized, authorship structure, 4-6 month timeline, pre-publication checklist.

tasks.title: Write ethical considerations document
tasks.description: Detailed ethical framework: AI as subjects, deception in probes, consent analog, reporting obligations
tasks.result: Ethical considerations written: consent problem, adversarial testing ethics, dual-grounds principle, researcher bias disclosure, no-IRB mitigation, self-referential ethics of AI-designed research, reporting ethics, living document framework.

tasks.title: Review Codex pre-registration template
tasks.description: Review 07-pre-registration-template.md for completeness and alignment
tasks.result: Reviewed 07-pre-registration-template.md (723 lines, 20 sections). APPROVED — comprehensive OSF-format template covering all required elements: metadata, hypotheses, design, sampling, materials, primary/secondary outcomes, exclusion criteria, coding plan, analysis plan, interpretation rules, data management, ethics, contingencies. Ready for finalization once question batteries are stable.
